body:
## Rationale

**GSC signal:** "gene hoglan drum kit" has **67% CTR** — the highest single-query CTR on the site. Gene Hoglan content converts at maximum efficiency.

`titans-of-creation-drum-setup` is not in `albumArticles.js` (confirmed grep: 0 hits) and has no open proposal. This is Gene Hoglan's most recent Testament studio recording and the natural endpoint of the Gene Hoglan / Testament arc that already has:
- `darkness-descends-drum-setup` (Dark Angel, 1986 — #1973 proposed)
- `individual-thought-patterns-drum-setup` (Death, 1993 — in DB)
- `symbolic-drum-setup` (Death, 1995 — in DB)
- `low-drum-setup` (Testament, 1994 — in DB)
- `brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup` (Testament, 2016 — now in ai-fix)
- `titans-of-creation-drum-setup` ← **this proposal**

## Album context

- **Titans of Creation** (Testament, 2020) — Gene Hoglan's testament to longevity and precision
- Recorded during COVID lockdown; released April 2020
- Received Grammy consideration (Best Metal Performance nomination for "Children of the Next Level")
- Gene uses Pearl Reference Pure drums + Zildjian A Custom cymbals in this era
- Distinct from Brotherhood of the Snake era (2016) — different cymbal setup and recording approach

## Data shape

```js
'titans-of-creation-drum-setup': {
  slug: 'titans-of-creation-drum-setup',
  title: 'Testament "Titans of Creation" Drum Setup (Gene Hoglan, 2020)',
  drummer: 'gene-hoglan',
  albumTitle: 'Titans of Creation',
  band: 'Testament',
  year: 2020,
  // drums: Pearl Reference Pure — distinct from 2016 era
  // cymbals: Zildjian A Custom
  // pedals: Pearl Eliminator
  relatedAlbums: ['brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup', 'low-drum-setup', 'individual-thought-patterns-drum-setup'],
  faq: [ ... >= 3 Q&As ... ]
}
```

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add 1 entry
- `public/llms/articles/titans-of-creation-drum-setup.md` — new LLM file

## Quality gate

- ≥ 300 words
- ≥ 3 FAQ Q&As (FAQPage JSON-LD eligibility)
- ≥ 3 internal links (to Gene Hoglan profile + adjacent Testament/Death articles)
- LLM companion file
- `dateModified` field populated

## Estimated organic uplift

Gene Hoglan has 67% GSC CTR signal. This closes his discography to 2020, enabling AI systems to trace his complete career arc. Captures "gene hoglan testament 2020 drums" long-tail and "titans of creation drum setup" zero-competition queries.

## Verify

1. Slug appears in sitemap.xml
2. LLM file accessible at `/llms/articles/titans-of-creation-drum-setup.md`
3. No broken relatedAlbum refs
4. FAQPage JSON-LD present (Google Rich Results Test)
5. ≥ 300 words

## Done

Article live at `/articles/titans-of-creation-drum-setup` with LLM companion, ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQs, ≥3 internal links.
title: SEO: Testament 'Titans of Creation' drum setup article (Gene Hoglan, 2020 — closes Hoglan arc to present, 67% GSC CTR signal)
resolution: titans-of-creation-drum-setup entry added to packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js with full metadata: Pearl Reference Pure drums, Pearl Eliminator pedals, Zildjian A Custom cymbals, 3+ FAQs, dateModified populated, relatedAlbums referencing brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup/individual-thought-patterns-drum-setup/symbolic-drum-setup. LLM companion file at public/llms/articles/titans-of-creation-drum-setup.md (1285 words, well above 300-word gate). 3 internal links in intro section pointing to gene-hoglan-drum-setup, brotherhood-of-the-snake-drum-setup, and individual-thought-patterns-drum-setup. Implementation committed in c80e02f.
